label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 12

extraction.one_line_summary: MOLANO Juan Sebastián won Zaragoza sprint after OLIVEIRA Rui positioned UAE through middle-right space while GROVES Kaden dropped chain at crucial moment.
tactical_patterns: UAE reversed conventional left-side positioning on leftward curve, exploiting middle-right space to avoid congestion and deliver MOLANO perfectly.
ROGLIČ Primož contested intermediate sprint bonus seconds despite GC gaps being small, narrowing deficit to EVENEPOEL before mountain stage.
KÄMNA Lennard burned matches for GROVES early, potentially overcommitting domestique resources before technical finale required positioning over horsepower.

rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastián: positive: UAE delivered him flawlessly through unconventional positioning when favorite mechanical'd, shows he can win against tier-one sprinters
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Rui: positive: exceptional leadout craft, identified space advantage middle-right against conventional wisdom on left-curving finish
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: mechanical at crucial moment but team appeared tactically exhausted after KÄMNA's early workload
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Boy: positive: third place despite being designated domestique for HOFSTETTER Hugo, shows individual sprint capacity when protected
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: aggressively contested intermediate bonus seconds to claw 4 seconds before Tourmalet, showing GC desperation mindset
